FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct ArcSpec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

A circular-arc stroke (WinUI ProgressRing — a trimmed, round-capped ring). The arc is centred in the node's box with radius (min(W,H)-Thickness)/2, a Thickness-wide stroke, swept from StartDeg for SweepDeg degrees (0° = 12 o'clock, clockwise). The recorder emits a DrawArc; the GPU draws the SDF arc with round caps. A full ring is SweepDeg = 360.

public readonly record struct ArcSpec : IEquatable<ArcSpec>
Implements
IEquatable<ArcSpec>

Constructors

ArcSpec(ColorF, float, float, float, bool)

A circular-arc stroke (WinUI ProgressRing — a trimmed, round-capped ring). The arc is centred in the node's box with radius (min(W,H)-Thickness)/2, a Thickness-wide stroke, swept from StartDeg for SweepDeg degrees (0° = 12 o'clock, clockwise). The recorder emits a DrawArc; the GPU draws the SDF arc with round caps. A full ring is SweepDeg = 360.

public ArcSpec(ColorF Color, float Thickness, float StartDeg, float SweepDeg, bool RoundCaps = true)

Thickness float
StartDeg float
SweepDeg float
RoundCaps bool

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
